posts.title: DSA Interview Prep - Linked Lists Simplified
posts.body: Just finished a detailed guide on linked list problems. Covers insertion, deletion, and cycle detection. Perfect for placements. Check the resources section!

posts.title: Hackathon happening this Friday at IIT Campus
posts.body: Registration is open for the annual coding hackathon. Prize pool of 2 lakhs! Teams of 3-4 members welcome. Meet at seminar hall 4pm Friday.
